_comment: Auto Audio Depth Estimation - research archive. 2026-July RayDPT-validation phase (FRESH RESET from the original baseline f677b0f + a LOSS FIX). The June improvement phase (champion composite 2.030) is fully archived on branch 2026-June-RayDPT-improvement. Champions are keyed by MECHANISM (lineage). results.tsv is the authoritative per-run log. Composite (honest ranking) = rmse/1.6 + (1-d1)/0.46 + 0.3*abs_rel/0.4 (lower better). Require > noise AND >=2-3 confirming draws before crowning.
reset_note: Restarted from the original RayDPT baseline (f677b0f, 5ch) with a CORRECTED loss: the coarse-layout and low-pass loss TARGETS now use MASK-WEIGHTED pooling (sum(gt*mask)/sum(mask)). The previous code averaged/blurred gt over ALL pixels including invalid gt=0 pixels, diluting the target toward 0 wherever a cell/region contained invalid pixels. compute_errors (the eval metric) is unchanged.

june_phase_archive.champion: 12ch multi-res STFT(512+128) + interaural coherence(512+128) + TTA (commit 36c6538, composite 2.030, ABS_REL -26%/RMSE ~-9%/d1 +7pts vs baseline)
june_phase_archive.note: Full history (164 runs, 29 studies) preserved on that branch. Findings to RE-VALIDATE under the fixed loss: optimisation envelope (bf16/bs32/lr4e-4/EMA), coarse/geometry ray attention, gated skips, multi-res STFT, interaural coherence, TTA; PROPOSAL-02 learned front-end FAILED.

metric.note: abs_rel is directly optimised by the relative loss term (if enabled) -> partly gameable; rank on the composite and never let a method win one metric while badly regressing the others.
